# OffsetEase

> OffsetEase is a climate, carbon and ESG advisory firm for enterprises and SMEs. Services span GHG accounting, product carbon footprints (PCF), life cycle assessment (LCA), environmental product declarations (EPD), EcoVadis and CDP score improvement, CBAM compliance, ESG and sustainability reporting (BRSR, CSRD, IFRS S1/S2), climate risk (TCFD), SBTi target setting, net zero and decarbonization strategy, carbon credits, and renewable energy procurement.

Contact: info@offsetease.com — a senior advisor responds within one business day.

## Services
- [GHG Accounting & Carbon Footprint](https://offsetease.com/ghg-accounting): Your Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions — measured to the standard auditors, customers and regulators accept.
- [Product Carbon Footprint (PCF)](https://offsetease.com/product-carbon-footprint): SKU-level carbon data in the format your buyers demand — before they choose a supplier who has it.
- [Life Cycle Assessment (LCA)](https://offsetease.com/life-cycle-assessment): The ISO-grade evidence behind every product claim you want to make — and every one you need to defend.
- [Environmental Product Declaration (EPD)](https://offsetease.com/epd): The verified document that gets your product specified — and keeps it in tenders that now require one.
- [EcoVadis Rating & Score Improvement](https://offsetease.com/ecovadis): The medal your customers gate procurement on — managed methodology-by-methodology until it moves.
- [CDP Reporting & Score Improvement](https://offsetease.com/cdp): The climate disclosure your investors and customers actually read — scored A to D-, in public.
- [CBAM Compliance](https://offsetease.com/cbam): The EU now prices the carbon in your products at its border. Verified data is the difference between margin and penalty.
- [ESG & Sustainability Reporting](https://offsetease.com/esg-reporting): BRSR, CSRD, IFRS S1/S2 — one data backbone, every framework, assurance-ready.
- [Climate Risk & TCFD / IFRS S2](https://offsetease.com/climate-risk): Physical and transition risk, quantified in financial terms — because your lenders and insurers already are.
- [SBTi Target Setting & Validation](https://offsetease.com/sbti): Science-based targets, validated first time — the credibility standard your customers now cascade.
- [Net Zero & Decarbonization Strategy](https://offsetease.com/net-zero): From pledge to funded pathway — a marginal abatement cost curve, a capital plan, milestones a CFO signs.
- [Carbon Credits & Carbon Markets](https://offsetease.com/carbon-credits): High-integrity credits, bought or sold with treasury discipline — value without the headline risk.
- [Renewable Energy Procurement](https://offsetease.com/renewable-energy): PPAs, RECs and on-site generation — Scope 2 reductions that cut energy cost and survive scrutiny.
- [ISCC Certification (EU, PLUS, CORSIA, CF)](https://offsetease.com/iscc): The certification that proves your feedstock, fuel or material is sustainable — and lets you sell it as such.
- [EUDR Compliance](https://offsetease.com/eudr): Prove your products are deforestation-free — to plot-level geolocation — or lose the EU market.

## Industries
- [Chemicals & Petrochemicals](https://offsetease.com/chemicals): Energy-intensive processes facing CBAM and tightening product-footprint requirements.
- [Pharmaceuticals](https://offsetease.com/pharma): A trust-driven sector where ESG scrutiny now extends deep into manufacturing and sourcing.
- [Textiles & Apparel](https://offsetease.com/textiles): Strict buyer requirements meet rising regulation and tight market access.
- [Automotive & Engineering](https://offsetease.com/automotive): OEMs are decarbonising their supply chains — and passing the requirements to you.
- [Manufacturing](https://offsetease.com/manufacturing): Rising compliance demands meet customer requirements and tight operating margins.
- [Metals & Mining](https://offsetease.com/metals): At the start of the value chain — so everyone downstream is asking questions.
- [Consumer Goods](https://offsetease.com/consumer): Brand trust lives or dies on claims you can substantiate.

## Company
- [About](https://offsetease.com/about): A strategy firm specialising in sustainability.
- [Methodology](https://offsetease.com/methodology): The five-stage advisory cycle.
- [Case Studies](https://offsetease.com/cases): Anonymised engagement results.
- [FAQs](https://offsetease.com/faqs): Common questions, plainly answered.
- [Contact](https://offsetease.com/contact): Book a consultation.
